titles.text: 神聖伝メガシード 復活編

descriptions.text: Shinseiden Megaseed: Fukkatsu-hen is a Strategy game, developed by Japan Media Programming and published by Banpresto, which was released in Japan in 1997.

When small meteorites fall to earth some people gain the ability to mutate using the megaseed. And the main character Yuuki have to defeat the organization called Gene. To do that he will have the help of different characters that will join him during the story.
